scenario_name: BTC Grid - First Tick, No Position
agent_instructions: You are a BTC/USDT grid trading specialist. Trade conservatively, prefer narrow grids with 10-20 levels. Minimum fill confidence before opening: RSI not overbought, spread < 0.1%.
strategy_instructions: Grid trade BTC/USDT on Binance. Open a grid executor when conditions look favorable. Target range: ±2% from mid price. Size: $500 per grid.

scenario_name: ETH Long Grid - Overbought, High PnL
agent_instructions: You are an ETH/USDT grid specialist. When RSI > 75 and unrealized PnL > 8%, consider taking partial profits by stopping the executor. Journal every decision.
strategy_instructions: Grid trade ETH/USDT. Actively manage positions when overbought. Prefer to lock in profits over riding the trend.

learnings: RSI above 75 has historically preceded -3 to -8% corrections on ETH within 4-12h.
